name: precog-skill
description: OpenClaw skill for PrecogMasterV8 prediction markets

envVars.PRIVATE_KEY: required — secp256k1 private key (0x-prefixed) for signing transactions. Written to ~/.openclaw/.env by setup.mjs --generate. Never transmitted over the network.
envVars.PRECOG_RPC_URL: optional — override the default public Base Sepolia RPC endpoints.

configPaths.~/.openclaw/.env: created by setup.mjs --generate. Stores PRIVATE_KEY in plaintext. Treat as a wallet key file: restrict permissions and back it up.

openclaw.network: Base Sepolia (chainId 84532) — public RPC endpoints only, or PRECOG_RPC_URL if set
